title: California Department of Transportation to Disburse $206 in Support of Clean Transportation Projects
content: On 8th October 2024, California Governor Gavin Newsom annouced that the California Department of Transportation would be disbursing $206 towards 149 local clean transportation projects. The funds would be sourced from the California Climate Investment funds in the Low Carbon Transit Operation Program  (LCTOP) which in turn receives finances from the cap-and-trade program in the state. While not all projects are directed towards clean transport fleet enhancements, multiple Zero Emission Vehicle (ZEV)-related infrastructure investments have been announced.
author: Analysts Account
